case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. RONALD A KELLEHER ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200010906)
